PLAN_STATE: Start from the baseline and prioritize the component with the highest likely headroom-to-effort ratio first. Use one subtask to inspect the portfolio structure, infer which component is most constrained, and produce a single improved feasible candidate rather than spreading effort thinly. If the first candidate looks weak, reallocate to the next most promising component and keep the final portfolio answer consistent across all three contracts. Aim for a conservative improvement strategy that preserves feasibility and avoids overfitting one component at the expense of the others.
